zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Aline de Braose於1286年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根高維爾時，她的父親William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose26歲，母親Agnes de Sully23歲。她於1298年與John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray在威爾士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1331年7月20日在威爾士享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness Aline de Braose于1286年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根高維爾时，她的父亲William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose26岁，母亲Agnes de Sully23岁。她于1298年与John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray在威尔士格拉莫爾根斯萬希亞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1331年7月20日在威尔士享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Aline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In the Middle Ages this represented a contracted form of Adeline . In modern use it is either a revival of this or a respelling of Aileen . In Scotland and Ireland it has sometimes been chosen as representing an Anglicized spelling of the Gaelic vocabulary word àlainn (Scottish), álainn (Irish), meaning ‘lovely’.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Aline de Braose was born in 1286, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose, was 26 and her mother, Agnes de Sully, was 23. She married John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray in 1298, in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 20 July 1331, in Wales, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Aline de Braose est née en 1286, à Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Sully, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray en 1298, à Swansea, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1331, à Galles, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness Aline de Braose 1286 in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Sully 23. Sie hat 1298 in Swansea, Glamorgan, Wales John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1331 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Aline de Braose è nata il nel 1286 nel Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Sully, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray nel 1298, nel Swansea, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1331, nel Galles, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Aline de Braoseが1286年にウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルで生まれた時，父William de Braose 2nd Baron Braoseは26歳，母Agnes de Sullyは23歳であった。1298年にウェールズグラモーガンスワンセアでJohn de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbrayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1331年7月20日にウェールズで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Aline de Braose(이)가 1286년 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Sully(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1298년 웨일스 글램르건 스완시에서 John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 7월 20일 웨일스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Aline de Braose nasceu em 1286, em Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Sully, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray em 1298, em Swansea, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de julho de 1331, em Gales, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Aline de Braose родилась в 1286 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Sully, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray в 1298 г. в местности свансеа, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 июля 1331 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baroness Aline de Braose nació en 1286, en Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, William de Braose 2nd Baron Braose, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes de Sully, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray en 1298, en Swansea, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1331, en Gales, a la edad de 45 años.
